description:
Offered: Fall. Offered as CSC 1900 in Spring.
This course introduces discrete mathematics as applied to computer science. Topics covered include Boolean logic, elementary set theory, functions, relations, enumeration, proof techniques, number systems and trees. Cross-listed with CSC 1900
Prerequisite(s): Advanced passing score on Advanced Algebra and Functions Accuplacer placement exam OR MATH 1250 or MATH 1300
Note: Credit is not given for both CSC 1900 and MATH 1900.
Meets General Education Requirement(s): PL
prerequisites: Advanced passing score on Advanced Algebra and Functions Accuplacer placement exam OR MATH 1250 or MATH 1300
